title: Part 7 – Entraînement 2 : rapports, politiques & contrats
instructions: Lisez chaque passage et répondez aux questions.

items.passage:
REFUND POLICY — Apex Electronics

We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are not happy with your order for any reason, you may return it within 30 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange.

Conditions:
• Items must be in their original packaging and unused.
• Proof of purchase is required.
• Digital downloads and customised items are non-refundable.
• Shipping costs are non-refundable unless the item is faulty.

To initiate a return, please contact our customer service team at returns@apexelectronics.com or call 0800 100 200. We aim to process all refunds within 5–7 business days of receiving the returned item.

questions.prompt: Within how many days can a customer return an item?
questions.explanation: "you may return it within 30 days of delivery".

questions.prompt: Which type of product cannot be refunded?
questions.explanation: "Digital downloads and customised items are non-refundable".

questions.prompt: How long does it take to process a refund?
questions.explanation: "We aim to process all refunds within 5–7 business days of receiving the returned item".

items.passage:
QUARTERLY SALES REPORT — SUMMARY
Period: July–September

Total revenue for Q3 reached €8.4 million, up 11% from the same period last year. The strongest performance came from the Enterprise segment, which grew by 23% year-on-year. The SME segment showed modest growth of 4%, while Consumer sales declined by 2% due to increased market competition.

Top-performing region: Northern Europe (+18%)
Low-performing region: South Asia (–6%)

Outlook: The sales team projects Q4 revenue of €9.1 million, contingent on successful contract renewals with three key accounts currently under negotiation.

questions.prompt: Which segment showed the strongest growth in Q3?
questions.explanation: "The strongest performance came from the Enterprise segment, which grew by 23%".

questions.prompt: Why did Consumer sales decline?
questions.explanation: "Consumer sales declined by 2% due to increased market competition".

questions.prompt: What does the Q4 projection depend on?
choices: Successful contract renewals with key accounts
questions.explanation: "contingent on successful contract renewals with three key accounts".

items.passage:
WORKPLACE INVESTIGATION POLICY

When a formal complaint is received, the following process will be followed:

1. Acknowledgement: The HR department will acknowledge receipt of the complaint within two working days.
2. Investigation: A trained investigator will be appointed within five working days. The investigation must be completed within twenty working days, unless an extension is agreed upon by all parties.
3. Outcome: The complainant and the respondent will each receive a written outcome letter within five working days of the investigation's conclusion.
4. Appeals: Either party may appeal the outcome within ten working days of receiving the outcome letter.

All parties are expected to treat proceedings with confidentiality.

questions.prompt: Within how many working days will HR acknowledge a complaint?
questions.explanation: "acknowledge receipt of the complaint within two working days".

questions.prompt: How long may the investigation take?
questions.explanation: "The investigation must be completed within twenty working days".

questions.prompt: Within how many days can either party appeal the outcome?
questions.explanation: "Either party may appeal the outcome within ten working days of receiving the outcome letter".

CONFERENCE PROGRAMME EXCERPT
Global Supply Chain Forum — Day 2

9:00 a.m. — Registration and Morning Coffee
9:30 a.m. — Keynote: 'Resilience in the Modern Supply Chain' — Dr. Alinta Ross, NovaTrade Institute
11:00 a.m. — Panel Discussion: Nearshoring vs. Offshoring — Pros and Cons
12:30 p.m. — Networking Lunch (sponsored by LogiCo)
2:00 p.m. — Breakout Sessions (three concurrent tracks):
   Track A: Sustainable Logistics
   Track B: Digital Transformation in Warehousing
   Track C: Customs Compliance and Cross-Border Trade
4:00 p.m. — Closing Remarks and Award Ceremony
5:00 p.m. — Drinks Reception

questions.prompt: What is happening at 12:30 p.m.?

items.passage:
LETTER OF RECOMMENDATION

To Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Fatima Okafor for any senior marketing position.

Fatima joined our team four years ago as a marketing coordinator and quickly rose to the role of Marketing Manager within eighteen months. During her time with us, she led the rebranding of our flagship product line, which contributed to a 34% increase in brand awareness and a 19% uplift in sales.

Fatima is a strategic thinker with exceptional interpersonal skills. She consistently demonstrated the ability to manage cross-functional teams and deliver results under pressure.

I have no hesitation in recommending her and am happy to be contacted for further discussion.

Sincerely,
James Carton, Chief Marketing Officer

questions.prompt: How long did Fatima work at the company?
questions.explanation: "Fatima joined our team four years ago".

questions.prompt: What was one result of the rebranding project?
choices: A 34% increase in brand awareness and 19% uplift in sales
questions.explanation: "34% increase in brand awareness and a 19% uplift in sales".

questions.prompt: Who wrote the letter?
questions.explanation: "James Carton, Chief Marketing Officer".

items.passage:
COMPANY TRAVEL INSURANCE SUMMARY

Coverage: All permanent employees travelling on company business
Policy Provider: GlobalGuard Insurance

Key Benefits:
• Medical expenses: Up to €500,000 per trip
• Trip cancellation: Up to €5,000 per booking
• Lost luggage: Up to €2,000 per trip
• Flight delay (over 4 hours): €50 per hour, max €300
• Personal liability: Up to €1,000,000

Exclusions:
• Pre-existing medical conditions not disclosed at the time of travel
• Travel to regions under active government travel warnings
• Alcohol or substance-related incidents

Claims must be submitted within 30 days of the incident.

questions.prompt: What is the maximum coverage for lost luggage?
questions.explanation: "Lost luggage: Up to €2,000 per trip".

questions.prompt: What flight delay compensation applies?
choices: €50 per hour up to €300 for delays over 4 hours
questions.explanation: "Flight delay (over 4 hours): €50 per hour, max €300".

questions.prompt: What is excluded from the policy?
choices: Travel to areas under government travel warnings
questions.explanation: "Travel to regions under active government travel warnings" is listed as an exclusion.

items.passage:
NEW EMPLOYEE BENEFITS GUIDE — Highlights

Welcome to Clearfield Group! As a new employee, you are entitled to the following benefits:

Health: Private medical insurance from day one, including dental and vision coverage.

Pension: The company contributes 6% of your basic salary to your pension, provided you contribute a minimum of 3%.

Annual Leave: 25 days per year, increasing to 28 days after three years of service.

Learning: An annual learning budget of €1,000 to spend on courses, books, or conferences relevant to your role.

Wellness: Access to the Employee Assistance Programme and a subsidised gym membership (50% covered by the company).

Full details are available in the Employee Handbook on the intranet.

questions.prompt: What is the company's pension contribution?
questions.explanation: "The company contributes 6% of your basic salary to your pension".

questions.prompt: How many annual leave days are given after three years?
questions.explanation: "25 days per year, increasing to 28 days after three years of service".

questions.prompt: What is the annual learning budget?
questions.explanation: "An annual learning budget of €1,000".

items.passage:
From: Sophie Bell
To: Marcus Webb
Subject: Re: Client Visit Next Thursday

Hi Marcus,

Quick update on the Delacroix visit next Thursday. They've confirmed four attendees instead of three, so we'll need to switch to the larger conference room on the second floor. Could you update the booking?

Also, I've just heard their CEO won't be attending after all — their CFO, Pierre Fontaine, will come in her place. He'll be presenting their expansion plans, so please make sure the projector and screen are set up in advance.

I'll handle the catering order — I've already emailed the kitchen with the dietary requirements.

See you Thursday!
Sophie

questions.prompt: Why is a room change needed?
choices: The original room is already booked
One more attendee will be coming than expected
The CEO requested a larger room
The projector is only in the larger room
questions.explanation: "They've confirmed four attendees instead of three".

questions.prompt: Who will attend instead of the CEO?
questions.explanation: "their CFO, Pierre Fontaine, will come in her place".

questions.prompt: What has Sophie already handled?
choices: Emailing the kitchen with dietary requirements
questions.explanation: "I'll handle the catering order — I've already emailed the kitchen with the dietary requirements".

items.passage:
SEMINAR ANNOUNCEMENT

Topic: Introduction to Sustainable Business Practices
Date: Thursday, November 14th
Time: 2:00 p.m. – 5:00 p.m.
Venue: Room 3B, Business Innovation Centre, 22 Park Street

This interactive seminar is designed for managers and decision-makers who want to integrate sustainability into their business strategy. Topics will include carbon footprint measurement, supply chain ethics, green procurement, and reporting standards.

Facilitator: Dr. Yusuf Alade, Sustainability Consultant
Fee: €75 per person (includes materials and refreshments)
Max. participants: 20

To register, visit www.greenbizseminars.ie or email register@greenbizseminars.ie by November 7th.

questions.prompt: Who is the seminar designed for?
questions.explanation: "designed for managers and decision-makers who want to integrate sustainability into their business strategy".

questions.prompt: What does the fee include?
choices: A copy of Dr. Alade's book
questions.explanation: "€75 per person (includes materials and refreshments)".

questions.prompt: What is the registration deadline?
questions.explanation: "register... by November 7th".

items.passage:
NOTICE OF CHANGES TO BANKING SERVICES

Dear Valued Business Customer,

We are writing to inform you of changes to our business banking service effective January 1st.

Key changes:
• Monthly account maintenance fee will increase from €8 to €12.
• Free monthly transactions will be reduced from 100 to 75. Additional transactions will be charged at €0.30 each.
• International wire transfers will now be processed within 2 business days (previously 3).
• Business overdraft interest rate will decrease from 9.5% to 8.75%.

If you have any questions or wish to discuss alternative account options, please contact your relationship manager or visit our website at www.atlasbank.ie.

questions.prompt: By how much will the monthly account fee increase?
questions.explanation: From €8 to €12 = an increase of €4.

questions.prompt: What is the new number of free monthly transactions?
questions.explanation: "Free monthly transactions will be reduced from 100 to 75".

questions.prompt: What change has been made to international wire transfers?
choices: They will take longer to process
They will be processed one day faster
questions.explanation: "International wire transfers will now be processed within 2 business days (previously 3)" — one day faster.
